Mobile banking: Enroll in mobile app to deposit checks and pay bills on the go.
Online banking: Complete online enrollment to unlock transfers and eStatements.
Wire transfers: Wire capability is off; complete wire agreement to enable outbound wires.
Paperless: Switch to paperless statements to reduce mail and speed delivery.
Account alerts: Turn on balance and transaction alerts in preferences.
KYC / compliance: Upload remaining ID documents to clear pending KYC.
